tasks.title: Create shared type definitions
tasks.description: Create src/engine/types.ts with all shared interfaces: EffortReport, RoleBreakdown, StoryEstimate, RoleConfig, EffortForecast, CompressionReport, DeliveryActuals, CompressionRatios, CompressionSummary, CommitCluster. All types must match the DM-001, DM-002, DM-003 schemas from spec.md exactly.

tasks.title: Create spec parser for story extraction
tasks.description: Create src/engine/spec-parser.ts implementing extractStories(specPath: string): StoryEstimate[]. Parse spec.md markdown to extract US-### blocks with SP values, role assignments (RE/TS/PM/PE/DE), and titles. Stories without explicit SP get sp:0 and unestimated:true. Must throw with stderr 'spec.md not found' if file missing.

tasks.title: Create spec parser tests
tasks.description: Create src/engine/spec-parser.test.ts with Vitest tests: (1) extract stories from valid spec with US-001..US-003, verify storyId/title/sp/roles, (2) handle stories without SP (unestimated flag), (3) handle sub-stories US-001a, (4) throw on missing spec.md file.

tasks.title: Create role multiplier resolver
tasks.description: Create src/engine/roles.ts implementing resolveRoleMultipliers(config: GwrkConfig): RoleConfig[]. Canonical defaults: RE=6, TS=4, PM=2, PE=1.5, DE=5. Merge with overrides from config.effort.roles.<CODE>.hoursPerSP if present. Return full RoleConfig[] array.

tasks.title: Create effort computation engine
tasks.description: Create src/engine/effort.ts implementing computeEffort(stories: StoryEstimate[], roles: RoleConfig[], overheadFactor: number): EffortReport. Pure function: for each story, match roles to multipliers, compute rawHours = sp * hoursPerSP, apply overhead. Aggregate into RoleBreakdown[] and totals. Default overheadFactor=1.25.

tasks.title: Create effort report markdown writer
tasks.description: Create src/engine/report-writer.ts implementing writeEffortReport(report: EffortReport, outputDir: string): string. Generate markdown report matching the PRD §15 format: executive summary, role breakdown table, per-story table, methodology section. Write to docs/assessments/effort-<featureId>-YYYY-MM-DD.md. Return absolute path. Create outputDir if missing.

tasks.title: Create effort engine tests
tasks.description: Create src/engine/effort.test.ts with Vitest tests: (1) 5 SP × TS(4h) = 20h raw, 25h with 1.25× overhead (TR-002), (2) report file written to docs/assessments/ (TR-003), (3) missing spec.md → exit 1 (TR-004), (4) config override TS=6h/SP takes precedence (TR-013), (5) multi-role story hours summed correctly.

tasks.title: Create git timestamp collector
tasks.description: Create src/engine/git-timestamps.ts implementing collectTimestamps(featureDir: string): DeliveryActuals. Collect: specCreatedAt (OS birthtime or first git commit on spec.md), planApprovedAt (last plan.md commit before impl), firstImplCommit/lastImplCommit (git log on src/ files), prMergedAt (gh pr view, degrade gracefully to lastImplCommit if gh unavailable). Throw with 'No implementation commits found' if no impl commits.

tasks.title: Create git timestamp collector tests
tasks.description: Create src/engine/git-timestamps.test.ts with Vitest tests: (1) extract spec creation date from mocked git log (TR-005), (2) extract first/last impl commit timestamps, (3) graceful gh degradation — when gh fails, use lastImplCommit as delivery endpoint, (4) throw on no impl commits (TR-010), (5) OS file birthtime fallback.

tasks.title: Create commit clustering algorithm
tasks.description: Create src/engine/commit-cluster.ts implementing clusterCommits(timestamps: string[], gapMinutes: number): CommitCluster[]. Pure function: sort ISO 8601 timestamps, group by gap threshold (default 30 min). Each cluster has startedAt, endedAt, commitCount, durationMinutes. Edge cases: single commit → 1 cluster with duration 0, empty array → empty array.

tasks.title: Create commit clustering tests
tasks.description: Create src/engine/commit-cluster.test.ts with Vitest tests: (1) timestamps [0,5,10,120,125] min → 2 sessions, 15 min active (TR-006), (2) single commit → 1 cluster duration 0, (3) all within gap → 1 cluster, (4) empty array → empty array, (5) custom gap threshold of 60 min.

tasks.title: Create compression ratio calculator
tasks.description: Create src/engine/compression.ts implementing computeCompression(forecast: EffortForecast, actuals: DeliveryActuals): CompressionRatios. Point Compression = estimatedHours / (activeCodingMinutes / 60). Total Compression = estimatedDays / (deliveryWindowHours / 24). Handle division by zero (report as Infinity).

tasks.title: Create cross-feature summary generator
tasks.description: Add generateSummary(reports: CompressionReport[]): CompressionSummary to src/engine/compression.ts. Aggregate totals, compute averages, identify best/worst by pointCompression, determine trend ('improving'/'declining'/'stable') from 3 most recent features.

tasks.title: Create compression engine tests
tasks.description: Create src/engine/compression.test.ts with Vitest tests: (1) 287.5h / 0.75h = 383× point compression (TR-007), (2) 36 days / 0.73 days = 49× total compression (TR-008), (3) summary across 3 features with best/worst/trend (TR-009), (4) no impl commits → exit 1 (TR-010), (5) dormancy correctly excluded from ratios.

tasks.title: Extend GwrkConfigSchema for effort and compression
tasks.description: Modify src/utils/config.ts: extend GwrkConfigSchema with optional effort.roles (object keyed by role code with hoursPerSP: number) and optional compression.sessionGapMinutes (number). Use z.optional() — these are additive, not required. Add corresponding tests to src/utils/config.test.ts for valid/invalid overrides.

tasks.title: Create gwrk effort Commander command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/effort.ts: Commander command 'effort <feature>' with --json flag. Loads config, resolves role multipliers, calls extractStories() and computeEffort(), then either writes markdown report via writeEffortReport() or outputs JSON to stdout. Handle errors: spec missing, no stories.

tasks.title: Create gwrk compression Commander command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/compression.ts: Commander command 'compression [feature]' with --json and --all flags. For single feature: loads effort data, calls collectTimestamps(), clusterCommits(), computeCompression(), formats output. For --all: iterates all feature dirs, generates summary via generateSummary(). Handle errors: no feature, no impl commits, no effort data.

tasks.title: Register effort and compression commands in CLI
tasks.description: Modify src/cli.ts: import effortCommand and compressionCommand, register with program.addCommand(). Verify both commands appear in gwrk --help output.

tasks.title: Create CLI command tests
tasks.description: Create src/commands/effort.test.ts and src/commands/compression.test.ts with Vitest tests: (1) effort --json outputs valid JSON with totalSP and roles fields (TR-011), (2) compression --json outputs valid JSON with pointCompression and totalCompression fields (TR-012), (3) compression --all returns summary, (4) error cases for missing feature/spec.
